pdfItems:
• Discussed updates to the zoning ordinance for Wind, Solar and Mining to ensure compliance with
• Discussed additions to the zoning ordinance to include Data Centers and Battery Storage.
• Discussed the need to review how the new State Land Division Act will affect our ordinances.
• Discussed small houses and more affordable housing. Updates to our ordinances will be required.
• Discussed where to start first. Mining, battery storage and data centers were suggested.
